name: Atos SE
lede: Atos runs seven centers across seven Indian cities. Chennai, Mumbai, Pune, Tirunelveli, Vadodara, Bengaluru and Gurugram, covering GBS, built over fourteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Atos office in India. We map seven, across seven cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Atos SE GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Atos runs 7 verified centers across 7 Indian cities (Chennai, Mumbai, Pune, Tirunelveli, Vadodara, Bengaluru, Gurugram), covering GBS. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

titles.title: CTO and head of transformation -  Technology Centers India & Ph

about.description: Atos's India footprint covers Chennai, Mumbai, Pune, Tirunelveli, Vadodara, Bengaluru and Gurugram, spanning GBS. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 91 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Atos operate in India?
faq.a: Atos operates 7 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Atos have centers in?
faq.a: Atos's India footprint includes Chennai and 6 additional cities.

faq.q: What types of centers does Atos run in India?
faq.a: Atos runs GBS centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Atos's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Atos's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Atos's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Atos's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
